protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: Static extraction method: coated plant tissue was incubated, hydrophobic liquid was collected, and DNA-enriched MIL or IL was integrated into qPCR buffer.

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: Dispersive MIL-based lysis and extraction used magnetic recovery and direct qPCR integration; described as without elevated temperatures or chemical surfactants.

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: One-pot plant cell lysis and qPCR used MIL or IL with tissue directly in the qPCR assay; the reaction buffer required Tween20.

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: Page 9: “In the static method, the hydrophobic solvent is pipetted directly onto plant tissue and allowed to incubate.”

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: Page 9: “dispersing the MIL in a suspension of plant tissue”; described as compatible with “sequencing or Qubit detection.”

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: Page 11: plant tissue was “submerged by the hydrophobic solvent” while “allowing the nucleic acids to be amplified by PCR.”

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: Pages 8 and 12: “The Phire assay is a commercial one-pot PCR assay”; text notes it is “not qPCR compatible.”

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: “static one-step cell lysis and DNA extraction”; leaf “incubated at 25 °C”; DNA-enriched MIL “added to the qPCR assay”

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: “dispersive one-step lysis”; DNA-enriched MIL “washed once with water”; used in “the qPCR assay”; desorption included heating

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: “Conventional plant cell lysis was performed using the CTAB lysis”; tissue was heated and “centrifuged”; reconstituted for “downstream bioanalytical detection”

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: “SDS lysis was performed”; sample was exposed to heat, then “centrifuged”; supernatant collected for purification
